calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-11-2009 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-15-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge Andrew Y.S. Cheng, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of the West.
No appearance by defendant Silhouette Cleaners, Inc.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Hanife Ozen was filed on October 5, 2009.
Default was entered against defendant on October 5, 2009
Doe defendants were dismissed on October 5, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on October 13, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Bank of the West, and against the Defaulted Defendant Silhouette Cleaners, Inc. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $43,691.69.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,896.74.
Attorney's Fees - $2,500.00.
Costs - $415.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $49,503.43.

Additionally, it is further Ordered that plaintiff Bank of the West is the owner of the leased equipment described in paragraph three of the judgment.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Answers To Interrogatories And That Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted; For Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-07-2009 Text Ruling

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-07-2009 Set For Trial On Jan-19-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Dec-23-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 318
